originalTitle: First Ghanaians set to be repatriated from South Africa over anti-immigrant protests
title: First Ghanaians set to be repatriated from South Africa over anti-immigrant protests
content: It follows recent protests against illegal immigration that have led to fears there could be a resurgence in xenophobic violence.

originalTitle: South African president mounts legal challenge against report that could lead to impeachment
title: South African president mounts legal challenge against report that could lead to impeachment
content: Cyril Ramaphosa argues that the authors of the report "misconceived" their mandate.

originalTitle: Senegal's sacked PM Sonko elected parliamentary Speaker in challenge to president
title: Senegal's sacked PM Sonko elected parliamentary Speaker in challenge to president
content: As speaker, Sonko could use his position to challenge the policies of the president, his one-time ally.

originalTitle: ‘Deep suspicion’ of US lingers as Iran ponders agreement to end war
title: ‘Deep suspicion’ of US lingers as Iran ponders agreement to end war
content: Iranian officials said the latest US strikes only validated their scepticism and resolve to stand firm on demands.

originalTitle: ‘No livestock but still hope’: Palestinians prepare for Eid al-Adha in Gaza
title: ‘No livestock but still hope’: Palestinians prepare for Eid al-Adha in Gaza
content: Gaza Palestinians will mark a third Eid under war-like conditions, with a shortage of food and joy.

originalTitle: ‘Naturally scared’: India’s Muslims denied public spaces for Eid prayers
title: ‘Naturally scared’: India’s Muslims denied public spaces for Eid prayers
content: Asked to pray 'in shifts' and avoid spillage of mosque congregations to streets - Muslims denied visible celebrations.

originalTitle: Israel says new head of Hamas' military wing killed in Gaza City strikes
title: Israel says new head of Hamas' military wing killed in Gaza City strikes
content: At least three people were killed in the attacks, which came despite a ceasefire with Hamas being in place.

originalTitle: Dozens killed in Lebanon as Israel intensifies strikes
title: Dozens killed in Lebanon as Israel intensifies strikes
content: Israel says it struck 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon, after PM Benjamin Netanyahu vows to "crush" the Iran-backed group.

originalTitle: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
title: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
content: The attacks took place while Iranian and Qatari negotiators were in Doha for peace talks.

originalTitle: The footballer setting record straight after 46 years
title: The footballer setting record straight after 46 years
content: Roly Gregoire, Sunderland's first black player, sometimes wishes he had never played football because of the racist abuse he found too painful to talk about for 46 years.

originalTitle: Will 'bruised' Howe and Newcastle address problems in one window?
title: Will 'bruised' Howe and Newcastle address problems in one window?
content: Newcastle certainly have to get this summer right following a turbulent window a year ago.

originalTitle: Foden a 'victim' of football's packed schedule
title: Foden a 'victim' of football's packed schedule
content: Manchester City midfielder Phil Foden is a "victim" of football's packed fixture schedule after being left out of England's World Cup squad, says the chief executive of the PFA.
